nasb.text: So Edom revolted against Judah to this day. Then Libnah revolted at the same time against his rule, because he had forsaken the Lord God of his fathers.

esv.text: So Edom revolted from the rule of Judah to this day. At that time Libnah also revolted from his rule, because he had forsaken the Lord, the God of his fathers.

cnv.text: 從此，以東人反叛，脫離了猶大的統治，直到今日。那時，立拿人也反叛了，因為約蘭離棄了耶和華他列祖的　神。

ccb.text: 以东人至今仍脱离犹大的统治，立拿人也在那时候叛变了，因为约兰背弃了他祖先的上帝耶和华。
